testcase.name: test_cloud_client_delivers_profile_base_system_prompt_semiconductor

failure.message: AssertionError: the profile's base system_prompt must reach the outgoing cloud request -- it must not be silently dropped by an unpopulated OpenAICompatibleClient.system_prompt (BR-110) assert 'You are a professional semiconductor translator for IC design, packaging, and test content.' in 'Document context: ok'

testcase.failure: tests/test_orchestrator_context_detection.py:1045: in test_cloud_client_delivers_profile_base_system_prompt_semiconductor assert _SEMICONDUCTOR_ROLE_DECLARATION in system_messages[0]["content"], ( E AssertionError: the profile's base system_prompt must reach the outgoing cloud request -- it must not be silently dropped by an unpopulated OpenAICompatibleClient.system_prompt (BR-110) E assert 'You are a professional semiconductor translator for IC design, packaging, and test content.' in 'Document context: ok'
